name: Destroy Resource (real handler — emits Telegram inline-keyboard approval prompt)
_comment: Real handler. Pattern mirrors github-pr.json (PR #12) and create-adr.json (PR #11), with the success arm replaced by a Telegram inline-keyboard approval prompt (ADR-0005, Option B). Note the Routing Gate inverts the canonical condition: SUCCESS arm requires status='pending_approval' (the Router unconditionally returns this for requires_approval=true skills). Pairs with approval-callback.json which listens for callback_query updates and executes the destroy. callback_data format: 'dr:<verb>:<resource_type_short>:<resource_id>' where verb=a|d, resource_type_short=rs (railway-service, MVP). Required env vars: DESTROY_RESOURCE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SKILLS_ROUTER_URL, SKILLS_ROUTER_SECRET, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID. Inbound payload: { resource_type: 'railway-service' (required, MVP), resource_id: string (required, ≤48 chars), reason?: string, chat_id?, user_id? }.
